name: 02 - Realistic Medium Suite
description: Real-data business questions at the medium level — joins to lookups, group-by, named users/entities. Every scenario has ExpectedSql.

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets does each entity have?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name AS Entity, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: Break down ticket counts by status.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS Status, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets came from each source?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name AS Source, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketSources s ON s.Id = t.SourceId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: What are the top 5 ticket categories by volume?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 c.Name AS Category, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY c.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets did Sara Hassan create?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS SaraTickets FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId WHERE u.FirstName = 'Sara' AND u.LastName = 'Hassan' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets has Lina Mansour resolved?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS LinaResolved FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.ResolvedByUserId WHERE u.FirstName = 'Lina' AND u.LastName = 'Mansour' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show me tickets created by users from the Finance entity.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS CreatedBy FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = u.EntityId WHERE e.Name = 'Finance' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: List all the support agents we have.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS Name, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId WHERE r.Name IN ('SupportAgent', 'Support Agent') AND u.IsActive = 1 ORDER BY u.FirstName, u.LastName

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets do we have per priority?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT p.Name AS Priority, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY p.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created in April 2026?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS AprilTickets FROM Tickets WHERE YEAR(CreatedAt) = 2026 AND MONTH(CreatedAt) = 4 AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show me all tickets that have been escalated.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.EscalationLevel, t.EscalatedAt FROM Tickets t WHERE t.EscalatedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY t.EscalatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show me tickets assigned to Tariq Hamdan.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.AssignedToUserId WHERE u.FirstName = 'Tariq' AND u.LastName = 'Hamdan' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created this week?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS ThisWeek FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day, -DATEPART(weekday, GETDATE()) + 1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets came from the Mobile App?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS MobileTickets FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketSources s ON s.Id = t.SourceId WHERE s.Name = 'Mobile App' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Tickets per entity — show entity name and ticket count.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name AS Entity, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY Total DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many high and critical priority tickets are there?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS HighOrCritical FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name IN ('High', 'Critical') AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets is each agent currently handling?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.Email AS Agent, COUNT(*) AS Tickets FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.AssignedToUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.Email ORDER BY Tickets DESC

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets are not yet resolved?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Unresolved FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created by Health entity users?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS HealthCreated FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = u.EntityId WHERE e.Name = 'Health' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many attachments are stored in total?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalAttachments FROM TicketAttachments

Scenarios.Question: List the top 10 most active end-users by tickets created.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 u.FirstName + ' ' + u.LastName AS UserName, COUNT(*) AS Tickets FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.CreatedByUserId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY u.FirstName, u.LastName ORDER BY Tickets DESC

Scenarios.Question: Show me hardware-related tickets.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketCategories c ON c.Id = t.CategoryId WHERE c.Name = 'Hardware' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets does the Operations entity have?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS OperationsTickets FROM Tickets t JOIN Entitys e ON e.Id = t.EntityId WHERE e.Name = 'Operations' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show me all pending tickets and the reason they're pending.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.Id, t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.PendingReason FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Pending' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were resolved by support agents?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.Id) AS ResolvedByAgents FROM Tickets t JOIN AspNetUsers u ON u.Id = t.ResolvedByUserId JOIN AspNetUserRoles ur ON ur.UserId = u.Id JOIN AspNetRoles r ON r.Id = ur.RoleId WHERE r.Name IN ('SupportAgent', 'Support Agent') AND t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0
